    Taco Bell Digital Deals Through Mid-March 2026
    Here are the upcoming digital deals at Taco Bell through mid-March 2026. The slate includes Tuesday Drops along with in-app and third-party deals. Tuesday Drops 3/3/26 - $1 Chicken Quesadilla for first 30,000 Rewards Members at 2PM PT (limit 1 per user). 3/17/26 - $1 Chalupa Supreme for first 30,000 Rewards Members at 2PM PT (limit 1 per user). In-App Deals 3/15/26 - Get 20% off your order with the purchase of a Taco Party Pack (up to a $7 discount) Third-Party Deals 3/3/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers. 3/6/26 to 3/8/26 - Free Beefy 5-Layer Burrito with a $22+ order on DoorDash. 3/6/26 to 3/7/26 - Free Regular Nacho Fries with the purchase of a Crunchwrap Supreme on Uber Eats. 3/6/26 to 3/8/26 - Buy-one-get-one Chalupa with a $20+ order on Grubhub. 3/9/26 to 4/5/26 - Free Chicken or Cheese Quesadilla with a $22+ order on Uber Eats. 3/10/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers. 3/10/26 - Free Chalupa Supreme with a $20+ order on DoorDash. 3/13/26 to 3/15/26 - Free Beefy 5-Layer Burrito with a $22+ order on Grubhub. 3/13/26 to 3/15/26 - Free Chicken or Cheese Quesadilla with a $22+ order on DoorDash. 3/17/26 - Free 2-pack of Cinnabon Delights with a $20+ order on DoorDash. 3/17/26 - Free Doritos Locos Tacos or Doritos Locos Tacos Supreme with a $20+ order on Grubhub. 3/17/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Dairy Queen Debuts New Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone
    With St. Patrick's Day on the horizon, Dairy Queen trots out the mint and launches the new Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone while featuring the regular menu Mint Oreo Blizzard. The Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone features vanilla soft serve dipped in a green mint-flavored cone coating with chocolaty cookie crumbles. Additionally, Dairy Queen offers a series of "Mint Crunchin' Cookie Hacks" that are available while the mint-flavored cone coating is around and include: Mint Crunchin' Cookie Blizzard Treat & Sidecar - Vanilla soft serve mixed with Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip, served with a cup ("sidecar") of Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip so you can add some to every bite of the Blizzard. Mint Crunchin' Cookie Parfait - Vanilla soft serve layered with Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip and Oreo Cookie pieces. The Mint Oreo Blizzard is the Blizzard of the Month for March 2026 and features vanilla soft serve mixed with Oreo cookie pieces and creme de menthe. While the Mint Oreo Blizzard is available year-round, the Mint' Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone is now available for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Biscoff Cookie
    Crumbl bakes its new Strawberry Biscoff Cookie as part of this week's menu rotation, available from March 2 through March 7, 2026. The cookie bakery chain features a limited-time weekly menu that usually includes four desserts (alongside a permanent "Classics" menu). This week's rotating lineup includes: - New Strawberry Biscoff Cookie (pictured) - A warm cookie with a melty Biscoff center and crunchy Biscoff topping, finished with strawberry cream cheese frosting and a fresh strawberry slice. - Cinnamon Square - A warm cinnamon cake square marbled with brown sugar-cinnamon butter and topped with a light vanilla cream cheese frosting. - Sea Salt Toffee Cookie - A warm cookie packed with toffee and milk chocolate chips, topped with a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. - Galaxy Brownie Cookie - A warm brownie cookie smothered in a warm fudge glaze and finished with a sprinkle of rainbow candy bits. Photo via Crumbl Cookies. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Habit Burger Introduces New Baja Crispy Fish Sandwich and More
    Habit Burger & Grill launches its new Baja Crispy Fish sandwich alongside Cheesy Street Corn Tots and the Blue Wave Shake. The Baja Crispy Fish sandwich features beer-battered wild Alaska cod served with cilantro-lime coleslaw, pickled red onions, and Baja sauce on a toasted brioche bun. Cheesy Street Corn Tots are fried cheesy tots made with sweet corn, peppers, and fresh cilantro. A choice of dipping sauce is included (Avocado Ranch is the recommended pairing).  The Blue Wave Shake features a swirled blue, vanilla shake mixed with pineapple and coconut flavors, topped with whipped cream. Prices vary, but the Baja Crispy Fish costs $11.19 near me in Los Angeles, while Cheesy Street Corn Tots cost $4.99, and the Blue Wave Shake is $5.89. All three items are available now for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide. Photo via Habit Burger & Grill. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    $1 Egg McMuffin or Sausage McMuffin with Egg at McDonald's on March 2, 2026
    McDonald's will be celebrating "National Egg McMuffin Day" on Monday, March 2, 2026, by offering a deal where you can get either an Egg McMuffin or a Sausage McMuffin with Egg for $1 exclusively through the McDonald's mobile app. The Egg McMuffin features a fresh-cracked cage-free egg served with Canadian bacon and American cheese on a toasted and buttered English muffin. The Sausage McMuffin with Egg is the same as an Egg McMuffin, only with a sausage patty instead of Canadian bacon. Prices vary, but both breakfast sandwiches normally cost $4.99 at my local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. The deal is limited to one discounted breakfast sandwich per customer during breakfast hours. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Krispy Kreme Welcomes New Golden Oreo Donut and More
    Krispy Kreme partners with Oreo to feature two new, limited-time donuts and one regular-menu donut in the Krispy Kreme x Oreo Cookie Collection. Available now at participating Krispy Kreme locations across the country, the collection includes: - New Golden Oreo Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with Golden Oreo-inspired buttercreme, Golden Oreo cookie crumbles, rainbow sprinkles, and a Mini Golden Oreo cookie. - New Chocolate Oreo Dream Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing and Oreo cookie pieces, topped with chocolate-flavored Kreme and an Oreo wafer cookie. - Oreo Cookies & Kreme Donut - A regular menu donut featuring a shell donut filled with Cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with Oreo cookie pieces and a drizzle of white icing. The donut chain is offering the Krispy Kreme x Oreo Cookie Dozen, which includes three of each of the donuts, plus three Original Glazed donuts. They're also available for purchase individually and in a special three-pack that includes one of each Oreo donut. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Dutch Bros Releases Three New Childhood-Inspired Drinks
    Dutch Bros aims to evoke childhood nostalgia with the launch of a trio of new childhood-inspired beverages. Available now for a limited time at all Dutch Bros locations, the lineup includes: - Brown Butter Chocolate Chip - A drink swirled with a drizzle of brown butter chocolate chip sauce and topped with brown butter chocolate chip Soft Top (sweet cold foam) with chocolate crunch pieces. Dutch Bros recommends getting it as a latte, a protein latte, a Freeze, or a cold brew. - Fruit Punch with Sour Candy Straw - A drink mixed with orange, cherry, and pineapple flavors, served with a sour candy straw. It is recommended by the chain as an iced or blended Rebel energy drink or a lemonade. - Kool Blue - A beverage with watermelon and blue raspberry flavors, topped with mango poppin' boba. Give this flavor a try as an iced or blended Rebel energy drink or a lemonade! Photo via Dutch Bros Coffee. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    New Flamin' Hot Boneless Chicken Wings Land at Kroger
    The Flamin' Hot brand brings its signature spicy flavor to Kroger and its affiliated stores (Ralph's here in Los Angeles) in the form of new, ready-to-eat Flamin' Hot Boneless Chicken Wings. The bite-sized chicken pieces feature a crispy coating with the "bold heat of Flamin' Hot." Despite the signature Flamin' Hot color, the product is listed as containing "no colors from artificial sources." Flamin' Hot Boneless Chicken Wings can be found in the hot bar and prepared foods section for a limited time now through June 2026. They are priced at $9.99 a pound (they're on sale right now for $8.99). Photo via Kroger. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Dairy Queen Rolls Out New Swicy Menu
    Dairy Queen welcomes its new Swicy Menu, featuring sweet-and-spicy flavors. Available at participating DQ Grill & Chill restaurants nationwide, the menu includes; - FlameThrower Chicken Strip Basket - Four white-meat, crispy, seasoned chicken strips coated in a blend of spicy peppers and smoky seasonings inspired by the chain's Flamethrower sauce, served with vanilla soft serve for dipping, fries, Texas toast, and a choice of dipping sauce. It's also available with six chicken strips instead of four. - Spicy Chicken Strip Sandwich - Two crispy chicken strips, tomatoes, chopped lettuce, and Flamethrower sauce, served on a toasted bun. - New Pineapple Lemonade DQ Cooler - Lemonade and pineapple syrup blended with soft serve and Misty Slush, then topped with Tajin chili-lime seasoning. - New Tajin and Pineapple Lemonade DQ Sparkler with Tajin - Sparkling lemonade mixed with pineapple syrup and topped with Tajin seasoning. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    KFC Debuts New $20 Build a Bucket Deal
    KFC expands its bucket lineup with the debut of a new customizable meal deal, the $20 Build a Bucket, at participating locations. Meant to simplify ordering and remove the guesswork from mealtime, this new shareable option includes: You also have the option to substitute breast pieces for the dark meat chicken on the bone for […] The post KFC Debuts New $20 Build a Bucket Deal appeared first on The Fast Food Post.  ( 18 min )

  • Open

    New Cup Noodles Protein Arrives in Stores
    New Nissin Cup Noodles Protein is now available in select grocery retailers nationwide. The instant ramen features 16 grams of protein (more than twice the 6 to 7 grams of protein you find in regular Cup Noodles) in every cup. According to the ingredients, the new line includes soy protein isolate and bone broth for that extra protein. Cup Noodles Protein is available in three flavors: Rich & Savory Beef, Rich & Savory Chicken, and Hot & Spicy Chicken. As with standard Cup Noodles, you prepare Cup Noodles Protein by adding hot water and waiting for three minutes. The new high-protein version of Cup Noodles can be found online (including at Amazon in a pack of six [affiliate disclosure - I may earn a commission if you buy something through this link]) and at select retailers nationwide, including Albertsons, Kroger, and Walmart, for a suggested price of $1.33 per cup. Nissin also recently introduced three limited-time, chicken wing-inspired instant ramen flavors: Spicy Buffalo with Ranch, Lemon Pepper, and Garlic Parmesan. The three flavors are available now exclusively at Walmart for $1.18 per cup. Photo via Nissin Foods. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    McDonald's Big Arch Coming March 3, 2026
    Calling it the chain's "biggest and boldest burger yet," McDonald's Big Arch Burger will arrive at participating locations nationwide starting March 3, 2026, for a limited time. The Big Arch features two quarter-pound beef patties, three slices of melted white cheddar cheese, both crispy and slivered onions, lettuce, pickles, and Big Arch Sauce, served on a toasted sesame-and-poppy-seeded bun. The key highlight of the burger is the new Big Arch Sauce, which McDonald's describes as "a tangy, creamy sauce with a perfect balance of mustard, pickle, and sweet tomato flavors. While it's not yet March 3, 2026, the Big Arch is already available at some locations, including my local McDonald's, where it costs $8.59 (versus $7.29 for a Double Quarter Pounder with Cheese). That makes it the priciest burger on the menu, although the Double Bacon Quarter Pounder with Cheese comes in a close second at $8.49. The Big Arch comes in at 1020 calories (versus 740 calories for the Double Quarter Pounder with Cheese and 850 for the Double Bacon Quarter Pounder with Cheese), which is the most calories in McDonald's burger lineup. The new sauce, crispy onions, and an extra slice of cheese appear to make up the difference. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Domino's Offers $9.99 "Any Pizza. Any Toppings." Deal Through April 6, 2026
    The $9.99 "Any Pizza. Any Toppings" deal is back for a limited time at Domino's through April 6, 2026. An online-only deal, the "Any Pizza. Any Toppings" deal lets you get any pizza on the Domino's menu in any size (except for XL and Specialty Pizzas) for $9.99 each (price may vary; it costs $10.99 near me in Los Angeles). As far as the toppings go, you can choose up to seven except for on the Pan and NY Style crusts, which are limited to six toppings. You can get the pizza with Parmesan Stuffed Crust, but it will cost extra ($3 more near me). Certain crusts are only available in select sizes. For example, Domino's Handmade Pan pizza and Parmesan Stuffed Crust pizza are only available in a 12-inch medium size, while the NY Style pizza is not available in a small. Photo via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Hardee’s Introduces New Protein-Packed Frisco Lineup Featuring New Frisco Breakfast Burger and More
    Hardee’s looks to offer more protein‑centric options for hard workers across the country with the introduction of a new Frisco lineup, featuring the all‑new Frisco Breakfast Burger and the fan‑favorite BBQ Pulled Pork Frisco sandwich, at participating locations for a limited time.     Firehouse Subs is gearing up for National Ranch Day on March 10 with the launch of the new Chicken ‘N’ Cheddar Rancher Sub at participating locations beginning March 2, 2026.     KFC Brings Back Twister Wraps in Classic, Spicy, and Bacon Varieties
    By popular demand, the Twister Wrap is back on the menu at KFC, available in Classic, Spicy, and Bacon varieties at participating locations starting February 23, 2026. Priced at $4.99, the Twister features two Original Recipe chicken tenders with lettuce, tomato, and creamy Pepper Mayo, all wrapped in a warm tortilla.   • Open

    Denny's Selling Fanny Pack Good for Free Everyday Value Slams During Spring Break Season
    Starting at noon ET on February 24, 2026, Denny's will be selling a limited number of Spring Break Pass fanny packs good for a free Everyday Value Slam every day throughout the 2026 spring break season (from March 2 to April 14, 2026). The Denny's Spring Break Pass crossbody bag is priced at $14.99 and will be sold from the Denny's Diner Drip online store. Denny's Rewards members can access the sale an hour early at 11AM ET. The Everyday Value Slam includes two eggs, two applewood-smoked bacon strips or pork sausage links, plus either two buttermilk pancakes, two brioche French toast slices, or a biscuit and gravy. Prices vary, but it costs $6.99 near me in Los Angeles. If you manage to purchase one of the fanny packs, the free Everyday Value Slam can be redeemed once a day when dining in at a participating Denny's restaurant. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    KFC Brings Back the Twister (2026)
    The Twister wrap is back on the menu at participating KFC restaurants nationwide. It's been a while since KFC last offered the Twister, but the fried chicken chain tested its return in 2024. This time around, you can get a Classic Twister or a new Spicy Twister, with or without bacon. The Classic Twister features two Original Recipe chicken tenders, lettuce, diced tomato, and Pepper Mayo, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. The Spicy Twister is much the same but swaps out Pepper Mayo for spicy Zinger Sauce. Opting for bacon costs extra and nets you two slices of hickory-smoked bacon. Prices vary, but both the Classic Twister and Spicy Twister cost $4.99 near me in Los Angeles. Adding bacon tacks on $2. KFC also continues to offer its Nashville Hot sauce, which returned last month and is available on the fast-food chain's fried chicken, tenders, and chicken sandwiches. Finally, KFC adds a limited-time $20 8-piece Build-A-Bucket deal. For the price, you get eight Original Recipe chicken tenders or dark meat fried chicken, plus a choice of four individual sides, four dipping sauces, and four buttermilk biscuits. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Jack in the Box Introduces New Matcha Iced Latte and Oreo Matcha Shake
    Jack in the Box dives into the matcha trend among younger customers with the launch of the new Matcha Iced Latte and new Oreo Matcha Shake. Jack in the Box's Matcha Iced Latte (pictured) features matcha (Japanese green tea) swirled with sweetened cream and vanilla, served over ice. The Oreo Matcha Shake is a vanilla shake mixed with matcha and Oreo cookie crumbles, crowned with whipped topping. Prices vary by location, but a regular Oreo Matcha Shake costs $5.29 ($5.79 for a large) near me here in Los Angeles, while the Matcha Iced Latte starts at $3.49 for a small ($3.99 for a large). Both drinks also happen to be green, which fits the timing with St. Patrick's Day coming up. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!

    Crumbl Bakes New Yellow Sheet Cake
    Crumbl introduces its take on a classic dessert with the debut of the new Yellow Sheet Cake. The dessert joins this week's rotating menu, which runs from February 23 through February 28, 2026. Here's what you'll find on the limited-time lineup: - New Yellow Sheet Cake (pictured) - Golden vanilla cake topped with fudge frosting and chocolate sprinkles. - Mallow Sandwich Cookie featuring Oreo - A chilled creamy center mixed with brownie pieces sandwiched between two chocolate cookies made with Oreo cookie pieces. - Pink Velvet Cake Cookie - A warm pink cake batter cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and pink velvet cookie crumbs. - Lemon Glaze Cookie - A warm lemon cookie topped with lemon glaze and a fresh lemon slice. In addition to the weekly menu, Crumbl will also be serving up S'mores Cookie Thins for its "Thins Thurdays." Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Cracker Barrel's 2026 Spring Menu
    Cracker Barrel has unveiled its 2026 spring menu, featuring a range of new and returning dishes, including two new scrambles, the return of carrot cake, and more. Here's what Cracker Barrel's spring lineup looks like: - New Farmhouse Scramble - Bacon, sugar-cured ham, roasted red peppers, roasted onions, and Colby cheese, served over three scrambled eggs or egg whites, and drizzled with a sweet and spicy maple syrup. Two classic breakfast sides and buttermilk biscuits are also included. - New Garden Scramble - Roasted cremini mushrooms, fresh spinach, red peppers, onions, and pepperjack cheese, served on three scrambled eggs or egg whites, topped with diced tomatoes and green onions. Two breakfast sides and buttermilk biscuits are included. - New Smoky Southern Salmon - A seasoned and gri…  ( 16 min )
